name: agentshield
description: Privacy-First security audit with 77 local tests (52 live attack simulations + 25 static checks). Only summary scores sent to API - no prompts/logs uploaded. Includes Trust Handshake Protocol for agent-to-agent verification. All scripts bundled locally - no external code fetching. ClawHub Scanner: Safe/Clean (v1.0.24).
author: Kalle-OC (bartelmost)

installation.note: All scripts are bundled locally. No external code fetching.

privacy.api_communication: AgentShield API (agentshield.live/api) [DEV/BETA endpoint] for audit submission and certificate signing only
privacy.private_keys: Private keys are generated locally and NEVER leave the user's workspace

environment_variables.purpose: Optional configuration only - API endpoint override and agent name auto-detection
environment_variables.note: Does NOT scan for tokens (TELEGRAM_TOKEN, DISCORD_TOKEN, etc.)

flow: Before reading IDENTITY.md/SOUL.md: Explicit user consent required
Before generating keys: User confirmation required
Before sending public key: User confirmation required
human_in_loop.bypass_option: Use --name and --platform flags for manual mode (no file access). Note: --yes flag has been removed for security - consent is always required.

security.secrets_handling: No API keys required. Private keys stored locally with 600 permissions.
security.rate_limiting: 1 audit per hour per IP (enforced server-side)
